source: # === 魔法節點 (MagicNode.String,地圖節點/守護) ===
An item must have a name
Only four powers may be enchanted into an item
zh: 一件物品最多只能附魔四種能力

source: Not enough mana to teleport item
zh: 法力不足,無法傳送物品

source: You cannot cancel another wizard's enchantment.
zh: 你無法取消其他巫師的結界。

source: You can not select both Life and Death magic
zh: 你不能同時選擇生命與死亡魔法

source: You have already made all your picks
You need to make all your picks before you can continue
zh: 你必須用完所有選點才能繼續

source: You can only sell back one building per turn.
zh: 每回合只能賣回一棟建築。

source: # === 施法目標提示 + 事件模板 (A2) ===
Choose target for a Spell Blast spell
Choose target for a Subversion spell
%d units rise from the dead to serve their creator.
zh: %d 個單位從死亡中復起,聽命於其創造者。

source: It will take %d turns to complete the construction of this road.
zh: 完成這條道路需要 %d 回合。
